Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: Eye On Africa[Live]
programme.desc: Join Georja Calvin-Smith for all the news from Africa and the Maghreb, together with France 24's correspondents and guests of the show. Eye on Africa is on every week day twice a day. Have a look at African life and find out what is going on there in the sphere of politics, health care, business. Get to know how global affairs influence its top events and be the first to experience its colorful exotic culture.

Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: News[Live]
programme.desc: Watch the latest international top stories, The News every 30 minutes with the emphasis on debate, dialogue, role of cultural differences, analytics of key events all over the world, comments, hot topics of the day, reports.

programme.title: Eye On Africa
programme.desc: Join Georja Calvin-Smith for all the news from Africa and the Maghreb, together with France 24's correspondents and guests of the show. Eye on Africa is on every week day twice a day. Have a look at African life and find out what is going on there in the sphere of politics, health care, business. Get to know how global affairs influence its top events and be the first to experience its colorful exotic culture.

programme.title: Eye On Africa
programme.desc: Join Georja Calvin-Smith for all the news from Africa and the Maghreb, together with France 24's correspondents and guests of the show. Eye on Africa is on every week day twice a day. programme.title: E6 - Changing Tides
programme.desc: Bundle up as Lizzie heads north to tag sharks and witness first-hand the slow, sobering disappearance of sea ice. Do time in bear jail with polar bears who are caught raiding a town for food after their icy hunting grounds diminish.

programme.title: E1 - The Garden Route
programme.desc: In a park where land meets sea, the natural elements combine to create wonderful variety. Cola-colored water feeds forests green and dense. Fire and wind fuel growth in great diversity and rock shapes a coastline of many faces. Life thrives here - from the magnificent to the bizarre. This is the Garden Route National Park.

programme.title: E7 - The Road to Recovery
programme.desc: Beni and Lala get an unexpected visit from Vet Arga, Kesi makes a new friend on Bangamat Island, and Alejandra deals with a new view of the world after the accident at forest school leaves her blind in one eye.

programme.title: E6 - Changing Tides
programme.desc: Bundle up as Lizzie heads north to tag sharks and witness first-hand the slow, sobering disappearance of sea ice. Do time in bear jail with polar bears who are caught raiding a town for food after their icy hunting grounds diminish.

programme.title: E1 - The Garden Route
programme.desc: In a park where land meets sea, the natural elements combine to create wonderful variety. Cola-colored water feeds forests green and dense. Fire and wind fuel growth in great diversity and rock shapes a coastline of many faces. Life thrives here - from the magnificent to the bizarre. This is the Garden Route National Park.

programme.title: E6 - Changing Tides
programme.desc: Bundle up as Lizzie heads north to tag sharks and witness first-hand the slow, sobering disappearance of sea ice. Do time in bear jail with polar bears who are caught raiding a town for food after their icy hunting grounds diminish.

programme.title: E1 - The Garden Route
programme.desc: In a park where land meets sea, the natural elements combine to create wonderful variety. Cola-colored water feeds forests green and dense. Fire and wind fuel growth in great diversity and rock shapes a coastline of many faces. Life thrives here - from the magnificent to the bizarre. This is the Garden Route National Park.

programme.title: E8 - Outbreak!
programme.desc: The race is on to find Tulia and Zalipa, who are missing from Palas Island. And after months of convalescence, Beni returns to forest school but faces another setback at the milk bucket. Meanwhile, the vets keep a close eye on pregnant Dilla.

programme.title: E3 - Waiting for Winter
programme.desc: It’s November at Cape Tatnam. Winter is coming to the lower Western shore of Hudson Bay. But the ice - which should be forming on Hudson Bay by now - is nowhere to be seen. 2016 has been the warmest year on record. In late November, the temperature is 10 degrees warmer than its average. Climate change is wreaking havoc across the North. At just below zero degrees Celsius, the sea cannot freeze.

programme.title: Hidden Doors! Exploring The Unknown World
programme.desc: Aiba Masaki hosts a brand‑new overseas travel show like no other. He visits hidden places rarely introduced in Japanese media, guided by local residents, and also travels abroad to thank the people who make the everyday items we rely on. From stunning scenery and unique cuisine to surprising lifestyles and unexpected ties to Japan, the show uncovers the world's hidden secrets.

programme.title: Sleepless Night Talk With The Singer Ai
programme.desc: The artist AI listens to your problems about parenting, work, and relationships. If you've had a tough day, join us for 30 minutes-this program may help you find a brighter tomorrow.

programme.title: E97
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan's first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.title: It's Gala Day
programme.desc: It's the day of the gala. As the crowds arrive, there's drama backstage. Will Ella fix her costume in time for her big debut with Adriano? Will Kloe keep her nerves under control and nail her Hungarian performance? A surprising performance leaves everyone speechless.

programme.title: Tshavhadzimu
programme.desc: Four young adventurers travel to Tshavhadzimu in Mapungubwe National Park. They search for a cave with rock art, run into a herd of elephants and almost step on a dangerous snake.

programme.title: The Mysterious Bleeps and Bloops
programme.desc: When a highly advanced computer is loaned to Ayrton Park Public School, mysterious cyber events begin happening around town and Addison wonders if the occurrences could be part of a world-wide-web... of mystery!

programme.title: Ice Cream Stick
programme.desc: Ice cream isn't just fun for eating. Hepi and Briko come up with some sizzling ideas.

programme.title: Fico's Floaties
programme.desc: A rubber duck has been found on a beach with Fico's name on it! Fico lost it on a trip last year! But how did Fico's duck travel so far? The team flies off to recover the duck. The trail leads to an oceanographic research ship.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Rafa
programme.desc: Meet the Loro Parque Foundation Scientific Director - Rafa, also known as the ‘Birdman of Loro Parque'. He wears the badge with pride and every day he surrounds himself with all things ornithological - from parrots and puffins to penguins.

programme.title: Martians, Martians, Martians
programme.desc: When looking through their telescope gets Luna, Jupiter, and Clyde no closer to answering all their questions about Martians and life on Mars, the gang is going to have to become robots and explore Mars alongside the famous mars rover – Curiosity.

programme.title: Submarine
programme.desc: Kit and Mr. Battery dive into the deep ocean to retrieve Mr. Battery's lost camera..

programme.title: Trip to Japan - Part II
programme.desc: Our heroes prepare for a sleepover in the HQ, but it seems impossible to divide the space, so they each have a separate bedroom. Alim knows of places where people feel more comfortable sleeping together in the same room. Everyone is soon in Japan for a new adventure.

programme.title: Big Money
programme.desc: Why do some coins have holes in them? The team flies to Yap, Micronesia, where coins have holes. But to get one of the valuable ‘rai', they have to make and trade a handmade canoe! After the exchange, the Team learns there's been a big misunderstanding.

programme.title: Programming and Coding
programme.desc: How did people compute before the invention of computers? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of computing. Have hands-on fun by making your own abacus, and get to know Ada Lovelace, the first computer programmer before the invention of computers.

programme.title: Big Money
programme.desc: Why do some coins have holes in them? The team flies to Yap, Micronesia, where coins have holes. But to get one of the valuable ‘rai', they have to make and trade a handmade canoe! After the exchange, the Team learns there's been a big misunderstanding.

programme.title: Submarine
programme.desc: Kit and Mr. Battery dive into the deep ocean to retrieve Mr. Battery's lost camera..

programme.title: What a Pong!
programme.desc: There is a pong or two in the lab as the doctors discover how your sense of smell can bring back memories. And Dr. Xand is flung back 246 years by the time machine to search for Mr. Grumbles' missing inhaler.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met... A Microscope
programme.desc: Henry meets a friendly Microscope. He has just discovered the cure for smelly burps.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met... An Aeroplane
programme.desc: Henry meets a friendly Aeroplane. He's had a busy day flying around the world but he finds out he still has one last delivery to make.

programme.title: What a Pong!
programme.desc: There is a pong or two in the lab as the doctors discover how your sense of smell can bring back memories. And Dr. Xand is flung back 246 years by the time machine to search for Mr. Grumbles' missing inhaler.

programme.title: A Feisty Badger
programme.desc: Today Matilda, the horse, has surgery, and a cute but feisty badger needs help after being hit by a car. The Junior Vets release Timbuktu, the hedgehog, back into the wild, and Johnny and Inel find out how fish sleep and meet a dog with a passion for pop music.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Jorge
programme.desc: As Loro Parque's head vet, Jorge never knows from one day to the next what will come through his clinic. Javier, Loro Parque's Head of Environmental Affairs, is hitting the high seas of Tenerife with a turtle tracker in hand to help with scientific research.

programme.title: News Of Shenzhen
programme.desc: Presented as a leisurely variety show, the program revolves around the theme: 'Seek Paradise Along the Journey to Kunlun Mountain.' Throughout their travels, the adventurers will uncover lesser-known towns, each exuding its own unique charm. They will explore the distinctive characteristics of these hidden gems, savoring every street and lane, as well as every bite and sip. This immersive experience seeks to rediscover the essence of life, allowing our weary hearts to shine anew amidst the dust of daily grind.

programme.title: E103
programme.desc: Emmy and Grammy Award-winning comedian Jimmy Fallon brings his unique high-energy comedy to the storied 60-year NBC franchise with his welcoming interview style, love of audience participation, spot-on impersonations and innovative sketches.

programme.title: E2 - Selfie
programme.desc: Andrea is hospitalized in the Internal Medicine ward, hoping that the place most familiar to him will help him recover his memory. Giulia oversees his rehabilitation but finds herself dealing with a different man to the one she knew.

programme.title: E3 - Nothing Personal
programme.desc: Andrea returns to the ward as an assistant to the trainees, who were terrified of him just a few weeks earlier. While he tries to win back his ex-wife, his collaboration with Giulia on a case proves to be challenging and full of surprises.

programme.desc: As NCIS investigates a dangerous connection between the Nexus cartel and Parker's longtime nemesis, mob boss Carla Marino, the team uncovers a high-stakes plot involving stolen nuclear material. programme.title: Nim's Island
programme.desc: Nim is adventure author Alex Rover's number one fan and she lives on an isolated island with her scientist father. When her father is lost at sea and the island is being invaded, she convinces the agoraphobic and a germaphobe author to come and help.

programme.desc: The six remaining chefs are tasked with recreating a picture perfect dish using just the memory of a reference photo.

E3 - Roots Run Deep
programme.desc: After a morning on the Bayou, the Duck Camp Dinners crew enjoy a fresh cooked dinner while discussing the changing coastal wetlands of Louisiana. Jean-Paul gets to finally a hunt an area he had only heard about as a young man, and takes in the beauty of the live cypress trees this camp is known for.

programme.title: Love For Life
programme.desc: Zhang Ziyi won worldwide acclaim for her performance as an AIDS sufferer who falls in love with another HIV patient.

programme.desc: Tia's new balloon gets stuck in a tree, so Tim tries to get it down.

programme.title: E102 - Movie
programme.desc: Tim tries to make his own Captain DinoStar movie.

programme.title: E207 - The House Of Barbapapa
programme.desc: Barbapapa finds refuge in the house that Francois' parents built for him.

programme.title: E111 - The Grass Is Always Greener... / When I Grow Up
programme.desc: Barbabright coats the house in magic product to prevent water leakage. The next day, The house deflates like a balloon. // A bird builds its nest on Barbazoo's belly. Barbazoo wants to become a big tree to shelter animals. This becomes complicated.

programme.title: E212 - The Invasion / Prank Day
programme.desc: Barbalala receives a package and discovers little pink animals inside, which she calls the SQUEAKIES. // Barbabravo, Barbalala and Barbabeau are fed up with their brothers and sisters laughing at their expense.

programme.title: E101 - Balloon
programme.desc: Tia's new balloon gets stuck in a tree, so Tim tries to get it down.

programme.title: E223 - Buttercup / We Need To Save The Corals
programme.desc: Barbidou's beautiful roses mysteriously disappeared during the night. // Barbapapa decides to tell the barbababies about the time he went to explore the Arctic and the seabed.

programme.title: E106 - Spaceland / New Rocket / Babysitting
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia get lost at a play centre. // Tim tries to find a new rocket that's perfect for him. // Tim tries to bend all the rules when Terri comes to babysit.

programme.title: E102 - Movie
programme.desc: Tim tries to make his own Captain DinoStar movie.

programme.title: E147 - Mister Skinnylegs
programme.desc: George finds a spider in the bathroom sink, but Peppa is really frightened-until she realizes that it doesn't want to hurt her.

programme.title: E111 - The Grass Is Always Greener... / When I Grow Up
programme.desc: Barbabright coats the house in magic product to prevent water leakage. The next day, The house deflates like a balloon. // A bird builds its nest on Barbazoo's belly. Barbazoo wants to become a big tree to shelter animals. This becomes complicated.

programme.title: E105 - Tiny Croc / Camping Croc
programme.desc: Daisy and Mr. Crocodile find a tiny lizard who wants to be just like Mr. Crocodile. // Winston tries to be the leader on a nature hike, but his high-tech gadget gets everyone lost in the woods.

programme.title: E415 - Pups Chill Out / Pups Save Farmer Alex
programme.desc: Roger's frozen food delivery truck gets stuck in a ditch. // Farmer Yumi's animals are stampeding towards town.

programme.title: E321 - Trip To The Moon
programme.desc: Peppa's family go to the museum's moon exhibition with George's friend Edmond Elephant. But Peppa thinks there are going to the real moon and is worried.

programme.title: E322 - Grandpa At The Playground
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig takes Peppa and George to the playground, but does not understand the children's rules.

programme.title: E323 - Goldie The Fish
programme.desc: Goldie the fish does not look happy and is not eating her food, so Peppa, George and Mummy Pig take her on a bus trip to visit Dr Hamster the vet.

programme.title: E325 - Numbers
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends learn how to count by playing games at Madame Gazelle's daycare.

programme.title: E107 - Safety Croc / Good Sport Croc
programme.desc: When Daisy skins her knee learning to skateboard, Mr. Crocodile tries to keep her from ever getting another booboo. // Good sports Mr. Crocodile and Daisy face off in a game of soccer with bad sport Winston.

programme.title: E217 - Paper Landscapes / Cowgirl
programme.desc: Barbamama and Barbapapa are surprised to see more and more billboards on the road. // Barbalala dreams of becoming a cowgirl and Barbidou is determined to help her.

E1 - Let's Play All The Best Games!
programme.desc: It's time to play all the best games with Kii & Yii! The fun begins with a high-stakes game of Red Light, Green Light, where Jeepbot is 'It' with a slime cannon blaster! Then, Kii & Yii play a fun game of life-size Snakes & Ladders, complete with toy snakes & big ladders. The competition continues with a game of Duck, Duck, Goose in mini race cars & a summer pool party game of Marco Polo with Snappy Croc!

programme.title: E3 - Sleep Music With Twinkle
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E6 - Let's Learn to Be Healthy!
programme.desc: Let's learn how to be healthy with Baby John! He learns all about the bones that make up his body when he visits the doctor & his friend 'Mr. Skeleton'! Then, after tripping & falling while playing soccer, Baby John learns the tough task of tying his own shoelaces! The health lessons continue as Mom & Dad teach him how to properly sneeze into his arm to keep everyone around him from getting sick.

programme.title: E4 - A Magical Sky Adventure!
programme.desc: Go on a magical sky adventure with Twinkle! First, discover the variety of cloud shapes & sizes, from triangles & squares to star-shaped clouds! Then, daydream high in the clouds with Twinkle & Mr. Moon, where her magical stardust makes the moon sneeze & keeps changing colors! The sky-high fun continues as Twinkle soars through the sky on a magical journey to explore all the vibrant colors of the rainbow.

programme.title: E3 - Gentle Lessons & Bedtime
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some gentle lessons & soothing bedtime songs. First, Twinkle learns about the importance of eating healthy, delicious fruit, like bananas, oranges & grapes. Then, help her find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make! After a long day of learning, it's time to get ready for bed. Listen as Twinkle & Mr. Moon sing a soothing nighttime lullaby to help you relax & drift off to sleep.

programme.title: E5 - Let's Make, Play & Learn with JJ!
programme.desc: Get ready to make, play & learn with JJ! First, find out what JJ's favorite pizza toppings are as you sing along to this yummy adventure. Then, Dad shows JJ how to make a healthy & delicious snack: fresh fruit ice cream! The hands-on fun continues as TomTom shows JJ how to be a 'toy mechanic' & fix his favorite toy school bus when a wheel pops off. From learning about veggies to becoming 'Clean Machines,' it's a day of creative fun!

programme.title: E2 - Underwater Learning Adventures!
programme.desc: Dive into some underwater learning adventures with The Sharksons! First, join the sea friends as they swim through the alphabet to learn their ABCs. Then, explore the vibrant hues of Splashy Reef with a journey to learn all the shades of a beautiful rainbow. The learning continues with important daily routines! Sing along with Tucker the Turtle as he takes a bath & watch as Baby Grub eagerly learns the importance of dental care by brushing her big, sharp shark teeth!

programme.title: E1 - The Ultimate Teamwork & Rescue Special!
programme.desc: Get ready for the ultimate teamwork & rescue special with Kii & Yii! The adventure begins when Princess Cat is flying her plane but gets in a sticky jammy mess, causing her to lose control! It's up to Kii & Yii to get her down safely. Then, the friends are playing near Princess Cat's castle when she accidentally falls down the well & needs to be rescued again! From helping Humpty Dumpty to rounding up runaway vegetables, Kii & Yii always save the day!

programme.title: She’s Got No Name
programme.desc: Set in a bustling alleyway during the Japanese occupation of Shanghai in the 1940s, the film centres on a wife, Zhan Zhou, who was being charged with the bloody dismemberment of her husband – a killing that seems impossible for her to have committed alone. The murder thrusts Zhan into the spotlight and the court of public opinion, forcing her towards a fate intertwined with that of her own country.

programme.title: Baogu Produces -Deconstructing the Cold War Universe
programme.desc: Director Longman Leung is here to shed light on the mysteries of the “Cold War” series. What actually does the operation codename “Cold War” mean? Longman reveals that not a single shot had been fired in the first script while the foreshadowing in dialogue of 'Cold War' and 'Cold War 2' are going to be revealed in the sequel! Let's find out more behind-the-scenes stories of the “Cold War” series shared by Longman.

programme.title: 77 Heartbreaks
programme.desc: When Adam and Eva break up after ten years, Adam thinks the breach was caused by one trivial incident, but Eva knows she's already forgiven Adam 77 times! Sweethearts since law school, Adam changed professions to start a Thai boxing studio and gradually became indifferent to Eva. Seemingly petty matters, like forgetting she hates raisin cookies, become the catalyst for her moving out and changing her Facebook status to 'single'. Despondent, Adam has a drunken tryst with his student, Mandy. Adam gains new insight after accidentally discovering Eva's private journal. Entitled '77 Heartbreaks', the title refers to the philosophy that 'forgiving someone 7 times isn't enough; 70 x 7 times is too much; so go ahead and forgive 77 times!' Reading it makes Adam realize his love. But what can he do to win her back? And what secret is contained in the journal's torn-out last page? He rushes to Eva and melts her heart by recounting their happy memories. When Eva tells him Heartbreak #77

programme.title: Be With You: An Abandoned Team
programme.desc: Yam Chun Kai, is a 60-year-old curmudgeon living alone. Forced into retirement, Uncle Kai reflects on his failed marriage and strained relationship with his daughter. As the hopelessness prompts him to end his life, a stray dog named Roast Piggy finds Uncle Kai and leads an animal welfare volunteer, Una Tang, to rescue him-the intelligence and humanity of Roast Piggy change Uncle Kai's attitude towards stray animals. Uncle Kai becomes friends with Una and joins her animal shelter 'Warm Home' as a volunteer, helping the abandoned animals. Una hopes Uncle Kai can take this opportunity to clear the air between him and his daughter Zoie. Just as Uncle Kai's life seems to be getting back on track, several dog poisoning incidents occur in the village he lives in...

programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: E104 - Houbi Houba Heist
programme.desc: Mica's Marsup journal ends up in Acu's bag so he has to get it back before his friend finds it.

programme.title: E219 - Man Ray Returns / Larry the Floor Manager
programme.desc: When Man Ray rents Squidward's house for the weekend, it's up to SpongeBob and Patrick to stop his evil vacation! // Mr. Krabs takes a vacation and makes Larry the Lobster the temporary manager of the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: E1008 - My Phony Valentine / Man Of My Schemes
programme.desc: On Valentines Day, Rusty and his girlfriend, Amber, must hide their love when they realize their parents are business rivals. // When Lori sees a photo of Bobby with another woman on social media, she decides it's time to start dating again.

programme.title: E405 - The Haunting of Flim Flam House / Rube Tube
programme.desc: Patrick and Squidina help the Flim-Flam brothers hunt the ghost that haunts their house. // On her day off from the Patrick Show, Squidina helps Rube produce his TV show.

programme.title: E219 - Man Ray Returns / Larry the Floor Manager
programme.desc: When Man Ray rents Squidward's house for the weekend, it's up to SpongeBob and Patrick to stop his evil vacation! // Mr. Krabs takes a vacation and makes Larry the Lobster the temporary manager of the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: E1012 - Student of the Jeer
programme.desc: Hoping to change her reputation at school, Stella tries to prove that she's not the teachers' pet.

programme.title: E108 - LAD / Before 10AM
programme.desc: Determined to learn the truth about Jack's secret morning life, Lily does the unthinkable and wakes up early. But her sleuthing gets them both in big trouble. // Lil and her BFFs Anusha & Debs fight to win the coveted trophy at Hank N Beans arcade.

programme.title: E216 - iMake Sam Girlier
programme.desc: When Sam admits she has a crush on a boy at school, Carly teaches Sam how to entice him by acting more girly. Meanwhile, Spencer is convinced that a girl likes him because of his tuxedo, so he starts wearing it all the time.

programme.title: E118 - Wi-Fi in the Sky
programme.desc: Tori's flight home is delayed leaving her no time to finish a school project with her friends. She attempts to get the work done with them over video chat but things keep getting in the way.

programme.title: E219 - Future Tense / Lynner Takes All
programme.desc: When Mom and Dad meet an impressive family they worry their kids aren't doing enough to ensure successful futures. // Tired of Lynn's poor sportsmanship during board games, the siblings decide to team up to take her down.

programme.title: E116 - Backpay Payback
programme.desc: Granny Tentacles helps Squidward collect his paper delivery money from Cecil.

programme.title: E286 - Hot Crossed Nuts / Sir Urchin and Snail Fail
programme.desc: Sandy's homemade snack becomes a big hit at the Krusty Krab. // SpongeBob and Patrick's favorite comedy duo has a falling out on live television.

programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: Goin' Bulilit S15[Live]
programme.desc: A gag show with child actors playing adult roles, doing gags, sketches and segments. Instead of playing roles based on their own age, child actors are made to portray adult characters like Doctors, Teachers, Married Couples, etc.

programme.title: Blood Vs. Duty[Live]
programme.desc: Two brothers separated in a maritime tragedy grow up on opposite sides of the law - one a dedicated Intelligence Officer, the other fiercely protective of the Tausug family that raised him. When a corruption case pits them against each other, their long-buried secret threatens to ignite a war between blood and loyalty.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: Uubusin Ko Ang Tapang Mo
programme.desc: Robert, a rebel leader weary of endless bloodshed, decides to seek peace by surrendering with his group to the government. However, as they make their way toward reconciliation, they face betrayal, internal conflict, and armed opposition that threaten to destroy their fragile hope for peace. The film explores loyalty, courage, and the cost of choosing redemption amid the chaos of war.

programme.title: 2 Good 2 Be True[Live]
programme.desc: Ali, a hardworking nurse with big dreams, crosses paths with Eloy, a clever mechanic secretly living a double life as a con artist and law student. Their rocky first meeting leads to an unexpected partnership involving a wealthy old man, hidden identities, family secrets, and emotional healing. As love grows amid deception, the series explores trust, redemption, and second chances, blending romance, comedy, and drama.

E7 - Iceland's Highland Lights
programme.desc: In Iceland, the Highlands lie 400 metres above sea level. Covering the same surface area as Switzerland and virtually uninhabited, they are one of Europe's last remaining wildernesses. Olivier Joly, journalist and photographer, invites us to discover his favourite spots, his friends and an age-old tradition: the Rettir.

programme.title: E5 - How To Improve Meals In Long Term Care And Accommodation Centers
programme.desc: Initiatives to enhance the nutrition of people living in long term care facilities are being implemented by those who've made it their mission. Also covered: juice pears; the best margarine; the Day of the Dead and pan de muerto in Mexico.

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 高中畢業出身會計師張浩宇面對大型會計師事務所的不正之風，以最不像會計師的方式實現正義。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E6 - 費玉清分享私人歌單
programme.desc: 全新互動音樂節目，以「星素結合」的形式全民共唱。100位素人歌手將通過現場K歌贏得機會成為三位幸運歌手，與每集的大咖歌手進行合唱挑戰，實現自己的夢想。大咖歌手嘉賓包括孫楠、羽泉等。

programme.title: E10 - 爆閃一家人 爆笑過大年
programme.desc: 重磅打造的全明星爆笑旅行遊戲真人秀，由黃曉明、黃子韜、劉耀文、邵子恆、王鶴棣、于洋組成「宇宙爆閃團」，用高能抽象任務，打造解壓式快樂體驗，去有趣的地方做有意義的事；放下偶像包袱，發送獨一無二的快樂訊號。

programme.title: E26
programme.desc: 圍繞「兼職女王」辛桐與四海集團繼承人聞裴安展開，辛桐為替閨蜜搞砸相親而錯誤結識聞裴安，聞裴安因家族逼婚僱傭辛桐假扮契約情侶，二人由此開啟與戀愛監察特工斗智斗勇的爆笑同居之旅。

programme.title: Money Movers
programme.desc: “Money Movers” provides investors with real-time analysis of the stories and the people attracting the attention of the markets each day. Capturing the energy of day's early trading, the program includes the breaking news and numbers driving stocks and sectors, helping investors make critical decisions. “Money Movers” anchors speak with the CEOs, government decision-makers and newsmakers who play a relevant role in how money is moving.

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC's Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what's driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: The China Connection
programme.desc: The China Connection delivers in-depth analysis of China's economy, markets and its relationship with the global landscape. Emily Chan brings you expert insights, exclusive interviews, covering key sectors, trade developments and policy shifts.

programme.title: Millionaires' Express
programme.desc: During the early reign of Republic of China, Cheng Fong Tin conducted speculative business in the Northeast frontier. Chinese Government sent secret agent Laifu to pursue him. However, Cheng was repeatedly able to escape. Train service between Shanghai and Chengdu was launched. The first train carried many high officials and noble lords including a Japanese envoy with the national treasure. It drew the attention of Shanghai triads colluding with gangsters to plunder the treasure. The train was forced to stop at Hanshui town due to the railroad was exploded by Cheng...

programme.title: Temps Present:2025-2026
programme.desc: ''Temps Present'' tackles current events broadly speaking. With its in-depth investigations and critical vision, the programme sheds light on the crises and the conflicts of our time, while denouncing the malfunctions of our society.

programme.title: E4 - Ali Akbar (Pakistan)
programme.desc: After more than fifty years selling newspapers by shouting the headlines, Ali was made a Knight of the National Order of Merit. At 18, he left Pakistan and arrived in France without knowing the language. By selling ''Charlie Hebdo'', ''Hara-Kiri'' and later ''Le Monde'', he became an emblematic figure of the Saint-Germain-des-Pres district in Paris.

programme.desc: All the African news from the TV5MONDE news staff.

programme.title: E29
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。
